candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.

variables.notes: Exact reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: This is the IFRS-style balance sheet cash and cash equivalents line and matches ending cash in the cash flow statement.
Also a cash line, but appears only in some years and seems less complete than the broader 'Liquid funds'.

variables.notes: Chose 'Liquid funds' as primary because it is the broader cash/cash equivalents label and ties to cash flow statement ending cash. 'Cash and bank' is included as secondary priority for years where labels changed.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities.
Current liability component only, not the total.
Current liability component only, not the total.
Current liability component only, not the total.
Clear short-term borrowing component within current interest-bearing liabilities; financing-related and non-lease.
Short-term financing instrument and part of current debt.
Appears under current interest-bearing liabilities, so this is current bond debt/current maturities.
Separate current interest-bearing debt bucket; financing-related and non-lease.
Could be short-term debt, but the explicit bank loans/overdraft line is cleaner.
Interest payable is not debt principal, so should be excluded from STD.

variables.notes: No clean single current-debt total excluding leases. Selected the minimal visible non-lease financing components. Excluded 'Financial leasing liabilities' per rule and excluded 'Interest Payable - Short-Term Debt' because it is not debt principal.

candidates.why: Best balance-sheet match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

candidates.row_label: Tax at source, social security costs
candidates.why: Contains payroll-related withholdings/social charges, broader than taxes payable.

variables.notes: Best direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

candidates.why: Best match to property, plant and equipment / net PPE on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, less clean than the reported total.

variables.notes: Preferred reported net tangible assets line as PPE proxy under IFRS. Excludes right-of-use lease asset subtotals as separate lines.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.
Best match for net cash flow from operating activities / operating cash flow.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from current operations before changes in working capital
candidates.why: Operating cash flow before working capital, not the final net operating cash flow.

variables.notes: Chosen as the final operating cash flow line after working capital effects, consistent with OANCF.
